.github/workflows/current-build.yml.general_idea: Update the CI workflow to use Java 21 instead of Java 17.
Update the build and test action to use the master branch instead of a specific version tag.
Remove the cache-id configuration from the build action.
Update the repository dispatch action to version 3.

.github/workflows/pull-requests.yml.general_idea: Update the GitHub Actions workflow to use Java 21 instead of Java 17 for building and testing.
Switch the build action reference from a specific version tag to the master branch.
Remove the cache-id input from the build action configuration.

inherited-pom-example.xml.general_idea: Update the parent POM version to the new 3.0.0-SNAPSHOT release.
Update the repository ID and URL to point to the new GitHub-hosted Maven repository.

pom.xml.general_idea: Simplify the java.project.version property by referencing java.version directly.
Upgrade Log4j to 2.25.1 to address security vulnerabilities and ensure JDK 21 compatibility.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Log4j versions may have security flaws and potential compatibility issues with newer JDKs.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Jackson to 2.20.0 to ensure compatibility with JDK 21 and other upgraded dependencies.
pom.xml.why_exists: While Jackson 2.15+ supports JDK 17, newer versions provide better stability and feature support for the JDK 21 ecosystem.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Gson to 2.13.1 to ensure compatibility with JDK 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Gson versions may encounter issues with JDK 21's stricter module system or reflection policies.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Apache Commons libraries to latest versions for JDK 21 compatibility.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older versions may rely on deprecated APIs or have compatibility issues with JDK 21.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade JGit to 7.3.0 to support JDK 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: JGit 6.x may not fully support JDK 21 features or may have compatibility issues.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Guava to 33.4.8-jre to ensure compatibility with JDK 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Guava versions may have issues with JDK 21's module system or reflection restrictions.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade database drivers (H2, PostgreSQL, Oracle) to versions compatible with JDK 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older JDBC drivers may not be compatible with JDK 21 or may have security vulnerabilities.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove GitHub site-maven-plugin configuration as it is no longer needed or supported.
pom.xml.before:
<plugin> <!-- Push artifact and files to github. Optional usage -->
				<groupId>com.github.github</groupId>
				<artifactId>site-maven-plugin</artifactId>...

pom.xml.general_idea: Add versions-maven-plugin profile to list available dependency updates.
pom.xml.after:
<profile> <!-- Display available dependency updates based on the properties for them -->
			<id>update-properties</id>...

pom.xml.general_idea: Add jackson-module-parameter-names dependency for improved JSON serialization.
Add apiguardian-api dependency for JUnit 5 compatibility.
Add JColor dependency for console output formatting.
Add powermock.version property and update PowerMock dependency to use it.
Update project version to 3.0.0-SNAPSHOT to reflect the major upgrade.
